mapper.select:
WITH BASE AS ( SELECT TM_NO , TM_CP_NM , TM_CP_TELNO , TM_MN_CD , TM_USE_YN FROM TRANSPORT_MANAGER WHERE TM_NO = #{trcTmNo} ), COMPANY_MANAGERS AS ( SELECT TM.TM_NO , TM.TM_CP_NM , TM.TM_CP_TELNO , TM.TM_MN_CD , TM.TM_NAME , TM.TM_USE_YN FROM TRANSPORT_MANAGER TM JOIN BASE B ON TM.TM_CP_NM = B.TM_CP_NM WHERE TM.TM_USE_YN = 'Y' ) SELECT MIN(CM.TM_NO) AS TM_NO , CM.TM_CP_NM , MIN(CM.TM_NAME) AS TM_NAME , MIN(CM.TM_CP_TELNO) AS TM_CP_TELNO , MAX(CM.TM_USE_YN) AS TM_USE_YN
, NVL(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TRAN_RCP TR WHERE TR.TRC_OWR_ID = #{owrId} AND TR.TRC_STATUS_CD = 'TRC_COMPLETE' AND TR.TRC_TM_NO IN ( SELECT TM_NO FROM COMPANY_MANAGERS ) ), 0) AS COMPLETE_COUNT
, NVL(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TRAN_RCP TR WHERE TR.TRC_OWR_ID = #{owrId} AND TR.TRC_STATUS_CD IN ( 'TRC_DONE', 'TRC_DISPATCH_WAIT', 'TRC_DISPATCH_DONE', 'TRC_ARR_ARRIVED', 'TRC_NTC_NSENT', 'TRC_NTC_SENT', 'TRC_DO_READY', 'TRC_DO_ISSUED', 'TRC_DO_REQ', 'TRC_STL_UNPAID', 'TRC_STL_REQ', 'TRC_STL_PAID' ) AND TR.TRC_TM_NO IN ( SELECT TM_NO FROM COMPANY_MANAGERS ) ), 0) AS ACTIVE_COUNT
, COUNT(*) AS EMPLOYEE_COUNT
, MIN(CM.TM_MN_CD) AS TRANSPORT_METHOD_CD , CASE MIN(CM.TM_MN_CD) WHEN 'SEA' THEN '해상' ELSE MIN(CM.TM_MN_CD) END AS TRANSPORT_METHOD_NM
FROM COMPANY_MANAGERS CM GROUP BY CM.TM_CP_NM
